sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; export default function Home() { const [isLoggedIn, setIsLoggedIn] = useState(false); useEffect(() => { const checkAuth = () => { const user = localStorage.getItem("currentUser"); const token = localStorage.getItem("authToken"); setIsLoggedIn(!!(user && token)); }; checkAuth(); }, []); return (
{/* Hero Section */}

All things investing,
simplified.

Invest in Stocks, Mutual Funds, ETFs and more with India's most loved platform.

{isLoggedIn ? ( Go to Dashboard ) : (
Get Started
)}
{/* Right: Illustration */}
{/* Mock floating UI elements */}
R

RELIANCE

+2.45%

H

HDFC BANK

-0.50%

💎

Users on Groww

Account Opening

100%

Paperless

24/7

Support

Invest in everything.

); } function ExploreItem({ icon, title, desc, color, iconColor }) { return (

{title}

{desc}

); }
